news.headline: Form 144: RPID insider notifies sale of 10,000 Class A shares (option exercise)
news.summary: An RPID insider filed a Form 144 to sell 10,000 Class A shares obtained via option exercise, the latest in a string of small routine insider sales also dated June 10 (5,000 shares), June 22 (3,688 shares) and July 1 (6,312 shares), against roughly 41.7 million shares outstanding.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems presents at PDA Good Aseptic Manufacturing Conference 2026 in Frankfurt
news.summary: A Rapid Micro Biosystems field application scientist presented a poster at the June 11-12 PDA Good Aseptic Manufacturing Conference in Frankfurt, Germany, continuing the company's engagement with European pharma-manufacturing and quality-control audiences for the Growth Direct platform.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
news.summary: The company granted 60,000 restricted stock units to a newly hired employee as a material inducement to employment, vesting in three equal annual installments over three years.

news.headline: KeyBanc Capital Markets cuts Rapid Micro Biosystems price target to $5 from $8
news.summary: KeyBanc lowered its price target on RPID to $5 from $8, citing the dilutive impact of the May equity raise, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the growth thesis.

news.headline: Lake Street cuts Rapid Micro Biosystems price target to $7 from $8
news.summary: Lake Street Capital Markets, a joint bookrunner on the May offering, trimmed its price target to $7 from $8 following the pricing of the new share/warrant issuance.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems Announces Pricing of Up to Approximately $32 Million Underwritten Offering
news.summary: RPID priced Class A shares with Series A/B warrants at a combined $1.955, raising about $9.8M in immediate gross proceeds (up to $32M if all warrants are later exercised for cash); Bain Capital Life Sciences, Armistice Capital and company insiders, including director Kirk Malloy, participated in the deal.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings (analyst-calendar estimate, not yet company-confirmed)
catalysts.detail: As of July 20, the company had not yet issued its customary advance press release fixing the Q2 report date (it announced the May 13 Q1 date about a week ahead of time, and the March 12 Q4/FY25 date about two weeks ahead). Historically RPID has reported Q2 in early-to-mid August (Aug 4 in 2023, Aug 12 in 2025); earnings-calendar trackers currently cluster estimates around late July/early August. Watch the guided ~$7.8M Q2 revenue, new Growth Direct placement cadence toward the 30-38 unit FY26 target, consumables pull-through, and cash runway following the May equity raise and subsequent sell-side price-target cuts.

catalysts.label: Continued Growth Direct multi-system order flow from large pharma/biologics customers (e.g. Samsung Biologics, MilliporeSigma channel)
catalysts.detail: Following the March 2026 follow-on multi-system order from Samsung Biologics and the ongoing five-year global distribution agreement with Merck KGaA's MilliporeSigma life-science business, further large multi-system placement announcements from top-20 biopharma customers remain a key upside catalyst toward the FY26 guidance of 30-38 placements and $37-41M revenue; no new order has been announced since March.

pulse: News flow has been thin over the past six weeks: aside from a routine June 10 inducement RSU grant and a Frankfurt conference poster presentation, the only recurring items have been small, scheduled insider option-exercise sales (June 10, June 22, July 1, July 8) that together total well under 1% of shares outstanding. The stock remains under pressure from May's dilutive ~$32M warrant-linked offering, which drove KeyBanc and Lake Street to cut price targets to $5 and $7 (from $8); shares bottomed around $1.70-1.85 in mid-to-late June before recovering to roughly $2.21 by mid-July. Fundamentally the business is still executing on Growth Direct placements and the MilliporeSigma/Samsung Biologics channel (Q1 revenue +11% YoY, FY26 guidance of 30-38 placements/$37-41M revenue reaffirmed), so the near-term story is a wait for Q2 results (expected late July/early August, not yet formally scheduled) to show whether placement and consumables momentum is offsetting continued cash burn and dilution.
